basic_details.job_title: BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) Part Time Medical Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of BHEL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years Age relaxation up to 70 years with specific approval of the management.

qualification.education_qualification: MDS (Master of Dental Surgery), Valid Registration Certificate issued by Dental Council of India (DCI)
qualification.details: MDS (Master of Dental Surgery) Valid Registration Certificate issued by Dental Council of India (DCI)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Verification of Original Certificates Personal Interview Medical Fitness Test

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BHEL PTMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Part Time Medical Consultant (PTMC) – Dental (MDS) post at BHEL is scheduled for 15th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this BHEL recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Dental Surgery (MDS) degree and a Valid Registration Certificate issued by the Dental Council of India (DCI) to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Part Time Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Part Time Medical Consultant (PTMC) – Dental (MDS) position is 65 years. However, age relaxation up to 70 years is possible with specific management approval.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the PTMC – Dental post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Part Time Medical Consultant (PTMC) – Dental (MDS) post in this recruitment drive by Bharat Heavy Electricals.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Part Time Medical Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Part Time Medical Consultant (PTMC) – Dental (MDS) position will receive a salary of Rs. 800/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this BHEL recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for the General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this BHEL recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the BHEL PTMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, Verification of Original Certificates, a Personal Interview, and a Medical Fitness Test.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110049. The exact address will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a full-time or part-time job?
faq.answer: This is a Part Time job opportunity. The post is for a Part Time Medical Consultant (PTMC) – Dental (MDS).
